query: HB 1110 sixplex arbitrage near Bellevue East Link stations
target_feature: HB 1110 sixplex-eligible SFH parcel near Bellevue Link station
area: Bellevue, WA — within 0.5mi of East Link 2 Line stations

results.name: ★ ACTIVE LISTING: 909 110th Ave SE, Bellevue, WA 98004
results.summary: Turn-key Surrey Downs home, vaulted ceilings, chef's kitchen, 3-car garage, wine cellar, heat pump.  Priced as finished retail, not teardown. Footprint too big for my candidate filter. Still inside HB 1110 sixplex overlay.
results.backboard_quote: ACTIVELY LISTED: $2,198,000 | MLS 2428792 | Roy Towse, Compass
results.features_quote: List: $2,198,000 | 4BR/2.5BA | 3,000sf | lot ?sf | built unknown | Type: finished home / retail

results.name: ★ ACTIVE LISTING: 815 108th Ave SE, Bellevue, WA 98004
results.summary: Builder/development opportunity with permits pretty much ready to construct a grand and modern luxury home — 5BR/6BA 5,591sqft or 8,134sqft home with 4-car garage and pool. Tenant occupied until end of June 2026.  Seller has pre-approved permits for a SINGLE mansion. This is critical — they're pricing teardown optionality as 1-unit luxury rebuild, not as 6-unit sixplex. That is the exact mispricing HB 1110 creates.

results.features_quote: List: $2,799,000 | 4BR/3BA | 2,018sf | lot 11800sf | built 1949 | Type: teardown / development opportunity

thesis_summary: WA HB 1110 (eff. 2025) + Bellevue's June-2025 implementation (which DOUBLED the state minimum sixplex radius to 0.5mi of light rail) + East Link lake-crossing opening March 28, 2026 (15 days ago) = a fresh, under-priced upzone of ~38 small-footprint SFH parcels concentrated almost entirely around East Main Station in the Surrey Downs vicinity. The other 5 Bellevue stations have ZERO meaningful SFH stock in the walkshed (commercial/office/wetland).

listing_summary.standout_finding_1: 815 108th Ave SE is listed at $2,799,000 as a SINGLE-mansion development play with pre-approved permits — but Bellevue's HB 1110 would let the buyer build 6 units instead of 1. This is the exact mispricing the thesis predicted.
listing_summary.standout_finding_2: 831 108th Ave SE (on candidate list) is owned by LIM KONG LLC — an investor already accumulating parcels two houses from the actively-listed teardown next door.
listing_summary.standout_finding_3: 11102 SE 1st Pl is 930 sqft on a 0.36 acre (15,681 sqft) lot, 165m from station — the highest lot-to-house ratio in the dataset. This is the dream sixplex parcel but not listed.
listing_summary.standout_finding_4: False positive at 11875 SE 4th Pl — it's a condo in zip 98005. Remove from the 34-count.
listing_summary.comp_range_for_similar_small_ramblers: Recent comps cluster around $1.25M-$1.8M for small untouched ramblers. Redfin AVMs estimate $1.8M-$2.2M for these same properties today. The two active listings (teardown and finished) price at $2.2M-$2.8M.
listing_summary.ask_of_owner_to_unlock: For the investor-owned 831 108th (LIM KONG LLC): a direct approach offering $1.2-1.4M could work, since they've been holding since before the upzone and may want to exit. For owner-occupied long-tenure candidates (313 109th since 2003, 319 111th with 62-year owner), probate/relocation triggers are worth monitoring.
